title: Retrospective Follow-Ups
goal: Implement the open retrospective child issues #347-#351 end-to-end while dogfooding the package workflow.
non_goals: Close the broader #230 product-compression umbrella unless a materially complete product-shape compression pass is achieved.
Switch branches or introduce host-specific requirements into shipped package behavior.

intent.outcome: Operational and closeout signals distinguish current actionable work from historical residue, generated adapters are less repetitive, and branch/dogfooding workflow boundaries are visible.
intent.constraints: Stay on master, keep shipped behavior repo-/agent-/tool-/language-/host-agnostic, and use provider-agnostic planning evidence for issue tracking.
intent.latitude: Implement compact package-level signals and tests; choose exact field names to fit existing report/preflight/summary contracts.
intent.escalation: Stop if an issue requires a host-specific workflow engine or branch switching.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan and continue #230 only when fresh product-compression friction appears.
execution.proof: agentic-workspace proof selected workspace_cli, planning_package, maintainer_surfaces, and planning_surfaces; all required commands passed.

invariants: Core planning consumes provider-agnostic external evidence only.
Branch-continuity guidance is advisory package signal, not a GitHub-only policy.
Closeout dogfooding evidence is explicit in this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Reduce visible product residue and make ordinary operation cheaper and easier to trust.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: #230 remains the umbrella unless this pass fully compresses the broader product shape.

required_continuation.activation trigger: New measured friction or repeated product residue after this slice.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Open retrospective issues are implemented through package surfaces rather than ad hoc chat memory.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: A full product-shape subtraction program for #230.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement open issues end-to-end again.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Close the concrete open retrospective follow-ups and leave the package state clean.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #347-#351 and keep #230 as parent unless fully satisfied.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that each child issue has a shipped behavior or visible signal, not just documentation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Workspace CLI/reporting code, tests, generated llms adapter, planning state/evidence, active execplan.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Prefer under 8 changed files before generated surfaces.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: proof-selected tests, ruff, planning checks, reconcile, summary/doctor/report dogfood.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Large CLI decomposition or schema replacement.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: External provider-specific workflow requirements or branch switching.

stop_conditions.stop when: All child issues #347-#351 are implemented, validated, closed, and planning evidence is reconciled.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Any child requires policy that cannot stay advisory and host-agnostic.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Validation failures point outside touched behavior.

context_budget.live working set: preflight, open issue bodies, targeted CLI/test code, this execplan
context_budget.recoverable later: archived execplans and historical audit reviews
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan execution_run and closeout_distillation.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Not needed; no memory-specific durable fact edit expected.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Continue from this execplan and package proof selector.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before broad reread or after validation failure.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay local and keep package behavior portable.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact field names and compact report phrasing.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A decision needs human branch/process policy beyond advisory package signals.

immediate_next_action: Inspect targeted CLI functions and tests, then patch compact signals.
invariants: Do not make GitHub a shipped package dependency.
Use the package workflow during implementation and record evidence.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Broad-work closeout should include package-use evidence.
Branch-continuity should be surfaced as advisory preflight/report signal.
Historical audit debt should become baselineable or clearly separated from current risk.
open_questions_to_close: Can #230 remain open while child issues close? Yes, unless product-shape compression is fully satisfied.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
completion_criteria: Planning evidence tracks only remaining open work.
No active execplan remains after archive closeout.
Validations pass and changes are committed and pushed.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json and live gh issue list
execution_run.what happened: Implemented #347-#351: operational compression now separates legacy from post-contract archive distillation debt; generated llms guidance is de-duplicated; closeout trust reports package workflow evidence; branch posture includes branch-mutation policy; planning closeout reconciliation supports accepted historical baselines and this repo carries a baseline review artifact.
execution_run.scope touched: Workspace CLI/reporting, planning package reconciliation, generated llms adapter, tests, provider-agnostic issue evidence, historical review baseline, and this execplan.
execution_run.changed surfaces: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py, packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py, tests, llms.txt, planning evidence/review/execplan surfaces.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section operational_compression --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json.
execution_run.result for continuation: #347-#351 were closed; #230 remains the only open umbrella item.
execution_run.next step: Archive this execplan and continue only from #230 if new measured residue appears.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; work stayed on #347-#351 and did not switch branches.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; open child issues were implemented and closed end-to-end.
finished_run_review.config compliance: compliant with repo-owned workflow surfaces and package dogfooding.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low for child issues; #230 remains intentionally open as broader umbrella.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused and full workspace CLI tests passed; planning package tests passed; ruff passed in root and planning package; maintainer surfaces and planning doctor passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and implement open issues end-to-end again.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #347-#351 are closed upstream and implemented in package behavior with tests.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Reduce total successful-completion cost across restart, handoff, review, and proof loops.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer compact queryable state and advisory workflow signals over new manual docs.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this pass make future package-led operation cheaper to trust?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: All concrete child issues are closed, but the product-compression direction is intentionally broader than this pass.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Code/tests, baseline review artifact, provider-agnostic issue evidence, and closed issue comments.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A closed child issue regresses or fresh residue appears under #230.

execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: This execplan closeout plus historical baseline review artifact.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory or config promotion needed.
execution_summary.resume from: No active execplan; reingest #230 if new product-compression work is requested.

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted #347-#351 from the retrospective roadmap candidate after package preflight and live issue ingestion.
2026-04-26: Completed after proof-selected validation passed and #347-#351 were closed.
